parameters-en.Rate: Controls the speed or rate of the flanger. When set to note values, Speed follows the system tempo.
parameters-en.Range: Sets the lower limit of the flanger sweep. Higher values result in wider, more dramatic sweeps. When FreezeLFO is on, sweeps the frequency of the comb filter.
parameters-en.Color: Controls the intensity of the flanger sweep by increasing feedback. Higher values result in more of that classic "whoosh."
parameters-en.FreezeLFO: When on, disables the automatic flanger sweep (LFO), so Rate no longer affects the sound. Adjusting Range then manually sweeps the frequency of the comb filter.
parameters-en.Mix: Controls the blend between the modulation effect and the dry signal.
parameters-en.Level: Sets the overall level of the block.
parameters-en.Headroom: Provides up to 12.0 dB of additional headroom.
